Name: deviceToken
Description: Bearer token for /v1/* endpoints (scout, graph, calendar, escalations). Enter via right-click > Customise. Token is stored in localStorage on this machine. Only sent to 127.0.0.1. Leave blank to run board-only mode (read-only /board/* still works).

Name: pollInterval
Description: How often to refresh board stats and state. Minimum 500ms. Default 10000 (10s). The server caches /board/stats for 15s anyway.

Name: motionEnabled
Description: Enable CSS animations (glow, sweep, pulse). Disable to reduce GPU load when animations are not desired.
